pi_items.source: Task description and metadata match. Real facility with this name exists in Colorado but at different address (1990 S Garrison St, not 456 Wadsworth), confirming this is test data referencing real location.

pi_items.verified_value: SYNTHETIC - 555 exchange reserved for fictional use
pi_items.source: Wikipedia and multiple sources confirm that 555-0100 through 555-0199 are officially reserved for fictional use in North America under the NANP. This phone number is not real.

pi_items.verified_value: SYNTHETIC - 555 exchange reserved for fictional use
pi_items.source: Same as phone - the 555 exchange (specifically 555-01xx range) is reserved for fictional/test purposes in NANP. This fax number is not real.

pi_items.verified_value: Wadsworth Boulevard exists in Lakewood, CO but exact address 456 not verified as clinic facility
pi_items.source: Web search found Walmart Supercenter at 440 Wadsworth Blvd, Lakewood, CO 80226 (4 addresses away). Address format is realistic but specific clinic location not verified.
Lakewood, Colorado is a real city. Lakewood Family Health Center and other healthcare facilities confirmed to exist there.
Colorado is a real US state with standard abbreviation CO.
80226 is a valid ZIP code for Lakewood, Colorado. Verified through address searches showing Wadsworth Boulevard properties in this ZIP.

pi_items.verified_value: Format valid but no registered organization found
pi_items.source: EIN follows correct format XX-XXXXXXX and prefix '84' appears valid. However, web search found no IRS Tax Exempt Organization database results or business registry matches for this specific EIN. Likely synthetic/test data.

pi_items.verified_value: Valid check digit but example/test NPI
pi_items.source: CMS documentation confirms this NPI has valid Luhn check digit (1234567893 where 3 is the correct check digit for 123456789). However, 1234567893 is the classic example NPI used in CMS training and documentation, not a real provider.
Healthcare Provider Taxonomy Code Set. 261QP2300X is defined as: Clinic/Center; Primary Care; Ambulatory Health Care Facilities. This is a real, valid taxonomy code used in HIPAA transactions.
CMS Place of Service (POS) Code 11 means 'Office' - location where healthcare professional conducts routine examinations, diagnoses, and treatments on an ambulatory basis. Valid POS code.
Valid hex color code representing medium light cyan-blue, also known as 'Summer Sky'. RGB(59, 185, 255).

privileged_info_summary: This task uses entirely synthetic test data. The facility name references a real organization (Lakewood Family Health Center exists in Colorado), but all contact details are fabricated: phone and fax numbers use the 555 exchange reserved for fictional use; NPI 1234567893 is the standard example used in CMS documentation; EIN 84-3127856 exists in valid format but matches no registered organization. The address uses realistic location details (Lakewood, CO 80226, Wadsworth Boulevard) but the specific clinic facility at 456 Wadsworth is not verified. Most technical codes are real (POS 11 for office, taxonomy 261QP2300X for primary care clinic, hex color #3BB9FF), but overall this is a test case with fabricated facility details.
